sql_array: CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY, name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, name) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326), 'Location A');
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, name) VALUES (2, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(2 2)', 4326), 'Location B');
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, name) VALUES (3, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(3 3)', 4326), 'Location C');
SELECT name, bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 0 4, 4 4, 4 0, 0 0))', 4326)) AS overlaps FROM spatial_data WHERE overlaps = TRUE;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 0 4, 4 4, 4 0, 0 0))', 4326))) AS overlap_count FROM spatial_data;
SELECT sanity::test(name) AS greeting FROM spatial_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sanity::test('Location ' || CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR)) AS greeting;
SELECT CASE WHEN bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326)) THEN sanity::test(name) ELSE 'No overlap' END AS result FROM spatial_data;
SELECT geom, COUNT(*) FROM spatial_data GROUP BY geom HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, name) VALUES (4, NULL, 'Location D');
SELECT DISTINCT sanity::test(NULLIF(name, '')) AS greeting FROM spatial_data;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM spatial_data WHERE id < 3;
SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((1 1, 1 2, 2 2, 2 1, 1 1))', 4326));
